title: skip_number_b missing leading-zero rejection
description: json_navigate byte-level path → skip_number_b doesn't reject leading zeros. Input {"n":01,"k":"v"}: extract_path(["k"]) succeeds; extract_field("k") on the same input fails. RFC 8259 §6 forbids leading zeros. The char-level json_skip_number has the check (and tests); the byte-level skip_number_b is missing both.
